member.name: T:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Core.Axis
member.summary: Axis enumeration for Mirror and Rotate90 operations.

member.name: F:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Core.Axis.X
member.summary: Horizontal axis (left/right).

member.name: F:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Core.Axis.Y
member.summary: Vertical axis (up/down).

member.name: F:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Core.Axis.Z
member.summary: Depth axis (front/back).

member.name: T:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Core.BoundedDeque`1
member.summary: Bounded LIFO deque: push to top (newest), pop from top (undo), evict from bottom (oldest) when count exceeds MaxDepth. Backed by for O(1) push/pop/evict. Standard Stack<T> cannot evict from the bottom.

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Core.BoundedDeque`1.MaxCapacity
member.summary: Maximum number of items before bottom-eviction.

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Core.BoundedDeque`1.Count
member.summary: Current number of items.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Core.BoundedDeque`1.#ctor(System.Int32)
member.summary: Creates a new bounded deque with the specified maximum capacity.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Core.BoundedDeque`1.Push(`0)
member.summary: Push an item to the top (newest). Evicts the bottom (oldest) item if at capacity.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Core.BoundedDeque`1.Pop
member.summary: Pop the top (newest) item.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Core.BoundedDeque`1.Peek
member.summary: Peek at the top item without removing it.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Core.BoundedDeque`1.Clear
member.summary: Clear all items.

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Core.BoundedDeque`1.IsEmpty
member.summary: Whether the deque is empty.

member.name: T:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Core.BrushShape
member.summary: Defines a brush shape and size for paint/erase operations.
member.param: Brush shape: Sphere, Cube, or Cylinder.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Core.BrushShape.#ctor(BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Core.BrushType,System.Int32)
member.summary: Defines a brush shape and size for paint/erase operations.
member.param: Brush shape: Sphere, Cube, or Cylinder.

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Core.BrushShape.Type
member.summary: Brush shape: Sphere, Cube, or Cylinder.

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Core.BrushShape.Radius
member.summary: Brush radius in voxels.

member.name: F:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Core.BrushShape.Default
member.summary: Default brush: sphere with radius 1.

member.name: T:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Core.BrushType
member.summary: Brush shape type for paint/erase operations.

member.name: F:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Core.BrushType.Sphere
member.summary: Voxels within Euclidean distance <= Radius from center.

member.name: F:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Core.BrushType.Cube
member.summary: Voxels within axis-aligned box of half-extent = Radius.

member.name: F:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Core.BrushType.Cylinder
member.summary: Voxels within XZ distance <= Radius, any Y within bounds.

member.name: T:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Core.IVoxelBuilderBridge
member.summary: Engine rendering contract. Implemented per-engine (Stride, Godot, Unity). Translates between SDK types (MeshData, VoxelCoord) and engine types.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Core.IVoxelBuilderBridge.OnGridLoaded(BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Grid.VoxelGrid)
member.summary: Full grid replacement — re-mesh everything.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Core.IVoxelBuilderBridge.OnChunksModified(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlySet{BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Math.ChunkCoord})
member.summary: Incremental mesh update for modified chunks.
member.param: Set of chunk coordinates that need re-meshing.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Core.IVoxelBuilderBridge.OnPaletteChanged(BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Grid.Palette)
member.summary: Palette has changed — rebuild palette texture atlas.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Core.IVoxelBuilderBridge.ScreenToVoxel(System.Single,System.Single)
member.summary: Convert screen-space position to voxel coordinate via raycasting.
member.returns: The voxel coordinate under the cursor, or null if no hit.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Core.IVoxelBuilderBridge.SetMesher(BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Meshing.IMesher)
member.summary: Swap the meshing strategy used for rendering.

member.name: T:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Core.IVoxelOperation
member.summary: Undoable, serializable operation contract. Every modification to a VoxelGrid flows through this interface, enabling undo/redo, network serialization, and per-source tracking.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Core.IVoxelOperation.Execute(BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Grid.VoxelGrid,BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Core.VoxelBuilderOptions)
member.summary: Apply the operation to the grid, capturing before-state for undo.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Core.IVoxelOperation.Undo(BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Grid.VoxelGrid)
member.summary: Restore the before-state captured during .

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Core.IVoxelOperation.AffectedRegion
member.summary: Bounding box of changed voxels.

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Core.IVoxelOperation.SourceId
member.summary: Who created this operation ("local", "generator", "player-2").

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Core.IVoxelOperation.Description
member.summary: Human-readable operation name.

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Core.IVoxelOperation.OperationType
member.summary: Type discriminator for serialization.

member.name: T:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Core.IVoxelStorageClient
member.summary: Optional persistence integration for saving/loading voxel grids. Implemented by plugins that connect to Save-Load or Asset services.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Core.IVoxelStorageClient.SaveAsync(BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Grid.VoxelGrid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Save the current grid state.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Core.IVoxelStorageClient.LoadAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Load a grid from storage.
member.param: Storage identifier (asset ID, save slot, etc.).
member.returns: The loaded grid, or null if not found.

member.name: T:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Core.OperationAppliedEventArgs
member.summary: Event arguments for . Contains everything a subscriber needs for network broadcast or persistence without re-serializing.

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Core.OperationAppliedEventArgs.Operation
member.summary: The operation that was applied.

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Core.OperationAppliedEventArgs.SerializedBytes
member.summary: Pre-serialized operation bytes for network broadcast.

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Core.OperationAppliedEventArgs.SourceId
member.summary: Who created the operation.

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Core.OperationAppliedEventArgs.AffectedChunks
member.summary: Chunks modified by this operation (for bridge + persistence).

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Core.OperationAppliedEventArgs.IsUndo
member.summary: True if this was an undo, not a forward apply.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Core.OperationAppliedEventArgs.#ctor(BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Core.IVoxelOperation,System.Byte[],System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlySet{BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Math.ChunkCoord},System.Boolean)
member.summary: Creates new event args.

member.name: T:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Core.OperationSerializer
member.summary: Serializes and deserializes instances to/from bytes. Uses a type-discriminated binary format. Before-state snapshots are NOT serialized — the receiver recomputes them by reading grid state before applying.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Core.OperationSerializer.Serialize(BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Core.IVoxelOperation)
member.summary: Serializes an operation to bytes: type discriminator + source ID + type-specific payload.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Core.OperationSerializer.Deserialize(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Deserializes an operation from bytes.
member.returns: The deserialized operation (before-state not populated — call Execute to capture).

member.name: T:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Core.OperationStack
member.summary: Per-source undo/redo stack with configurable depth. Each source (local user, generator, remote editor) gets its own stack so undo is scoped to the source.

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Core.OperationStack.SourceId
member.summary: Who owns this stack ("local", "generator", "player-2").

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Core.OperationStack.MaxDepth
member.summary: Maximum undo history depth.

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Core.OperationStack.IsModified
member.summary: Whether any operations have been applied since the last save/reset.

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Core.OperationStack.CanUndo
member.summary: Whether there are operations to undo.

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Core.OperationStack.CanRedo
member.summary: Whether there are operations to redo.

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Core.OperationStack.UndoCount
member.summary: Number of operations in the undo history.

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Core.OperationStack.RedoCount
member.summary: Number of operations in the redo history.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Core.OperationStack.#ctor(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Creates a new operation stack for the given source.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Core.OperationStack.Execute(BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Core.IVoxelOperation,BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Grid.VoxelGrid,BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Core.VoxelBuilderOptions)
member.summary: Execute an operation on the grid, push to undo stack, clear redo stack.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Core.OperationStack.PushWithoutExecute(BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Core.IVoxelOperation)
member.summary: Push an already-executed operation to the undo stack without re-executing. Used by CompoundOperation (sub-ops already executed during Begin/End span).

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Core.OperationStack.Undo(BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Grid.VoxelGrid)
member.summary: Undo the most recent operation and push it to the redo stack.
member.returns: The undone operation, or null if nothing to undo.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Core.OperationStack.Redo(BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Grid.VoxelGrid,BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Core.VoxelBuilderOptions)
member.summary: Redo the most recently undone operation.
member.returns: The redone operation, or null if nothing to redo.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Core.OperationStack.Clear
member.summary: Clear both undo and redo stacks.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Core.OperationStack.MarkSaved
member.summary: Reset the flag.

member.name: T:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Core.VoxelBuilder
member.summary: Main orchestrator for interactive voxel authoring. Holds the grid, per-source operation stacks, bridge reference, and provides the entry point for all editing. Operations are serializable and source-tagged for assisted and shared building.

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Core.VoxelBuilder.Grid
member.summary: The grid being edited.

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Core.VoxelBuilder.Bridge
member.summary: Engine rendering bridge (null for headless/server mode).

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Core.VoxelBuilder.Storage
member.summary: Optional persistence integration.

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Core.VoxelBuilder.Options
member.summary: Configuration.

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Core.VoxelBuilder.ActivePaletteIndex
member.summary: Currently selected palette entry for painting.

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Core.VoxelBuilder.ActiveBrush
member.summary: Current brush shape and size.

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Core.VoxelBuilder.Selection
member.summary: Current region selection (for copy/paste).

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Core.VoxelBuilder.Clipboard
member.summary: Copied region data.

member.name: E:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Core.VoxelBuilder.OnOperationApplied
member.summary: Fires for ALL operations (local + external). Subscribers use this for network broadcast and persistence without re-serializing.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Core.VoxelBuilder.CreateEmpty(BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Math.VoxelBounds,BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Core.VoxelBuilderOptions)
member.summary: Create a builder with a new empty grid.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Core.VoxelBuilder.LoadGrid(BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Grid.VoxelGrid,BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Core.VoxelBuilderOptions)
member.summary: Create a builder with an existing grid.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Core.VoxelBuilder.ExecuteOperation(BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Core.IVoxelOperation)
member.summary: Execute a local operation: apply to grid, push to local undo stack, fire event.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Core.VoxelBuilder.ApplyExternalOperation(BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Core.IVoxelOperation,System.String)
member.summary: Apply an external operation (from generator or remote editor).

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Core.VoxelBuilder.Undo
member.summary: Undo the most recent local operation.
member.returns: True if an operation was undone.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Core.VoxelBuilder.Redo
member.summary: Redo the most recently undone local operation.
member.returns: True if an operation was redone.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Core.VoxelBuilder.UndoExternal(System.String)
member.summary: Undo the most recent operation from a specific external source.
member.returns: True if an operation was undone.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Core.VoxelBuilder.RedoExternal(System.String)
member.summary: Redo the most recently undone operation from a specific external source.
member.returns: True if an operation was redone.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Core.VoxelBuilder.Place(BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Math.VoxelCoord,System.Byte)
member.summary: Place a single voxel.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Core.VoxelBuilder.Erase(BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Math.VoxelCoord)
member.summary: Erase a single voxel.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Core.VoxelBuilder.BrushPaint(BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Math.VoxelCoord)
member.summary: Paint with the active brush at the given center.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Core.VoxelBuilder.BrushErase(BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Math.VoxelCoord)
member.summary: Erase with the active brush at the given center.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Core.VoxelBuilder.Fill(BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Math.VoxelCoord,System.Byte,System.Nullable{BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Math.VoxelBounds})
member.summary: Flood fill from origin with the given palette index.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Core.VoxelBuilder.BoxFill(BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Math.VoxelBounds,System.Byte)
member.summary: Fill a box region.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Core.VoxelBuilder.BoxErase(BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Math.VoxelBounds)
member.summary: Erase a box region.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Core.VoxelBuilder.Mirror(BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Core.Axis)
member.summary: Mirror the entire grid across an axis.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Core.VoxelBuilder.Rotate90(BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Core.Axis)
member.summary: Rotate the entire grid 90 degrees around an axis.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Core.VoxelBuilder.Replace(System.Byte,System.Byte)
member.summary: Replace all voxels of one palette index with another.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Core.VoxelBuilder.Select(BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Math.VoxelBounds)
member.summary: Set the current selection region.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Core.VoxelBuilder.ClearSelection
member.summary: Clear the current selection.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Core.VoxelBuilder.Copy
member.summary: Copy the current selection to the clipboard.
member.exception: Thrown if no selection is active.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Core.VoxelBuilder.Paste(BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Math.VoxelCoord)
member.summary: Paste the clipboard at the given offset.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Core.VoxelBuilder.BeginCompound(System.String)
member.summary: Start grouping operations into a compound (atomic undo unit).
member.exception: Thrown if already in a compound.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Core.VoxelBuilder.EndCompound
member.summary: Finalize the compound operation and push to undo stack.
member.exception: Thrown if no compound is active.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Core.VoxelBuilder.DiffToOperation(BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Grid.VoxelGrid,BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Grid.VoxelGrid,System.String)
member.summary: Compute a GridPatchOperation from the difference between two grids. Used for generator output in the assisted building pattern.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Core.VoxelBuilder.SetBridge(BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Core.IVoxelBuilderBridge)
member.summary: Attach an engine bridge for rendering.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Core.VoxelBuilder.MarkSaved
member.summary: Reset the IsModified flag on the local stack.

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Core.VoxelBuilder.IsModified
member.summary: Whether the local stack has unsaved modifications.

member.name: T:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Core.VoxelBuilderOptions
member.summary: Configuration for the VoxelBuilder.
member.param: Whether to notify the bridge after each operation (default true).
Whether to skip frozen voxels in operations (default true).

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Core.VoxelBuilderOptions.#ctor(System.Int32,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Configuration for the VoxelBuilder.
member.param: Whether to notify the bridge after each operation (default true).
Whether to skip frozen voxels in operations (default true).

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Core.VoxelBuilderOptions.MaxUndoDepth
member.summary: Maximum undo history per source (default 100).

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Core.VoxelBuilderOptions.AutoMeshOnEdit
member.summary: Whether to notify the bridge after each operation (default true).

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Core.VoxelBuilderOptions.EnforceFrozen
member.summary: Whether to skip frozen voxels in operations (default true).

member.name: F:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Core.VoxelBuilderOptions.Default
member.summary: Default options.

member.name: T:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Core.VoxelClipboard
member.summary: Stores copied voxel data for paste operations. Voxels are stored in relative coordinates (from the selection min corner) with a palette snapshot for cross-grid paste.

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Core.VoxelClipboard.Voxels
member.summary: Voxels stored by relative coordinate from the selection origin.

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Core.VoxelClipboard.Bounds
member.summary: Bounding box of the copied region.

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Core.VoxelClipboard.PaletteSnapshot
member.summary: Palette entries used by copied voxels, indexed by original palette index. Used for cross-grid palette merging during paste.

member.name: T:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Core.VoxelOperationType
member.summary: Type discriminator for operation serialization/deserialization.

member.name: F:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Core.VoxelOperationType.Place
member.summary: Place a single voxel.

member.name: F:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Core.VoxelOperationType.Erase
member.summary: Erase a single voxel.

member.name: F:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Core.VoxelOperationType.Fill
member.summary: Flood fill connected region.

member.name: F:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Core.VoxelOperationType.Brush
member.summary: Paint/erase with a shaped brush.

member.name: F:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Core.VoxelOperationType.Box
member.summary: Fill or erase an axis-aligned box region.

member.name: F:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Core.VoxelOperationType.Mirror
member.summary: Mirror grid content across an axis.

member.name: F:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Core.VoxelOperationType.Rotate
member.summary: 90-degree rotation around an axis.

member.name: F:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Core.VoxelOperationType.CopyPaste
member.summary: Copy region and paste at offset.

member.name: F:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Core.VoxelOperationType.Replace
member.summary: Replace all voxels of one palette index with another.

member.name: F:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Core.VoxelOperationType.Compound
member.summary: Group of operations as one atomic undo unit.

member.name: F:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Core.VoxelOperationType.GridPatch
member.summary: Apply a VoxelDelta as a single operation (generator output).

member.name: T:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.ImportExport.BlockBenchExporter
member.summary: Exports a to BlockBench .bbmodel format (JSON). Groups voxels into maximal cuboid regions (greedy scan) to produce compact element lists. Written from scratch — clean-room JSON generation, no BlockBench source code dependency.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.ImportExport.BlockBenchExporter.Export(BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Grid.VoxelGrid)
member.summary: Export a VoxelGrid as .bbmodel JSON bytes.

member.name: T:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.ImportExport.BlockBenchImporter
member.summary: Imports BlockBench .bbmodel files (JSON) into . Parses cuboid elements into filled voxel regions with palette entries derived from per-face textures. Written from scratch — no dependency on BlockBench source code.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.ImportExport.BlockBenchImporter.Import(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Import a .bbmodel file from bytes.
member.returns: A VoxelGrid populated from the BlockBench model.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.ImportExport.BlockBenchImporter.Import(System.IO.Stream)
member.summary: Import a .bbmodel file from a stream.
member.returns: A VoxelGrid populated from the BlockBench model.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.ImportExport.BlockBenchImporter.DetermineDominantColor(System.Text.Json.JsonElement,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.Int32,BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Grid.Color})
member.summary: Determines the dominant color for an element from its face texture references. When faces reference different textures, uses the most frequently referenced one.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.ImportExport.BlockBenchImporter.ExtractOutlinerTags(System.Text.Json.JsonElement,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String})
member.summary: Recursively extracts group names from the outliner hierarchy as metadata tags.

member.name: T:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.ImportExport.GltfImporter
member.summary: Imports .glb/.gltf files into via SharpGLTF (MIT). Used for terrain overlay voxelization input — parse glTF, extract the first mesh primitive as MeshData for consumption by .

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.ImportExport.GltfImporter.Import(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Import a glTF/GLB file from bytes into MeshData. Only the first mesh primitive is imported.
member.param: File content bytes (.glb or .gltf with embedded buffers).

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.ImportExport.GltfImporter.Import(System.IO.Stream)
member.summary: Import a glTF/GLB file from a stream into MeshData.

member.name: T:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.ImportExport.IVoxelExporter
member.summary: Format export contract: VoxelGrid to bytes/stream.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.ImportExport.IVoxelExporter.Export(BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Grid.VoxelGrid)
member.summary: Export a VoxelGrid to bytes in the target format.

member.name: T:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.ImportExport.IVoxelImporter
member.summary: Format import contract: bytes/stream to VoxelGrid.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.ImportExport.IVoxelImporter.Import(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Import voxel data from bytes.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.ImportExport.IVoxelImporter.Import(System.IO.Stream)
member.summary: Import voxel data from a stream.

member.name: T:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.ImportExport.MagicaVoxelExporter
member.summary: Exports a to MagicaVoxel .vox format (RIFF binary). Handles the Y-up → Z-up coordinate conversion (Bannou uses Y-up, MagicaVoxel uses Z-up). Written from scratch — the RIFF structure is community-documented.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.ImportExport.MagicaVoxelExporter.Export(BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Grid.VoxelGrid)
member.summary: Export a VoxelGrid as .vox binary bytes.

member.name: T:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.ImportExport.MagicaVoxelImporter
member.summary: Imports MagicaVoxel .vox files (RIFF binary) into . Parses XYZI (voxel positions), RGBA (palette), and MATL (material properties) chunks. Handles the Z-up → Y-up coordinate conversion (MagicaVoxel uses Z-up, Bannou uses Y-up). Written from scratch — the RIFF structure is community-documented.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.ImportExport.MagicaVoxelImporter.Import(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Import a .vox file from bytes.
member.returns: A VoxelGrid populated from the MagicaVoxel model.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.ImportExport.MagicaVoxelImporter.Import(System.IO.Stream)
member.summary: Import a .vox file from a stream.
member.returns: A VoxelGrid populated from the MagicaVoxel model.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.ImportExport.MagicaVoxelImporter.ImportMulti(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Import a multi-model .vox file with scene graph transforms. Returns each model as a separate VoxelGrid with its relative transform.
member.returns: List of (VoxelGrid, relative position offset) tuples.

member.name: T:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.ImportExport.MeshExporter
member.summary: Exports a VoxelGrid to glTF/GLB format via meshing + SharpGLTF writer. Used for asset pipeline export and terrain bake-back. Includes per-vertex colors from the grid's palette.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.ImportExport.MeshExporter.#ctor(BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Meshing.IMesher)
member.summary: Creates a mesh exporter with the specified mesher.
member.param: The mesher to use for voxel-to-mesh conversion. Defaults to GreedyMesher if null.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.ImportExport.MeshExporter.Export(BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Grid.VoxelGrid,BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Meshing.MeshingOptions)
member.summary: Export a VoxelGrid as GLB binary.
member.param: Meshing options. Defaults to if null.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.ImportExport.MeshExporter.BeyondImmersion#Bannou#VoxelBuilder#ImportExport#IVoxelExporter#Export(BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Grid.VoxelGrid)
member.summary: Export a VoxelGrid as GLB binary (IVoxelExporter implementation, uses default options).

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.ImportExport.MeshExporter.ExportGltf(BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Grid.VoxelGrid,BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Meshing.MeshingOptions)
member.summary: Export a VoxelGrid as glTF JSON string.
member.param: Meshing options. Defaults to if null.

member.name: T:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.ImportExport.RawVoxelExporter
member.summary: Exports VoxelGrid to raw .bvox byte format. Thin wrapper around . Used for Save-Load and Asset service integration.

member.name: T:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.ImportExport.RawVoxelImporter
member.summary: Imports VoxelGrid from raw .bvox byte format. Thin wrapper around . Used for procedural output consumption.

member.name: T:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Operations.BoxOperation
member.summary: Fills or erases all voxels within an axis-aligned bounding box.

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Operations.BoxOperation.Bounds
member.summary: The bounding box to fill or erase.

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Operations.BoxOperation.PaletteIndex
member.summary: The palette index to fill with. Ignored when is true.

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Operations.BoxOperation.Erase
member.summary: When true, erases voxels instead of filling them.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Operations.BoxOperation.#ctor(BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Math.VoxelBounds,System.Byte,System.Boolean,System.String)
member.summary: Creates a new box operation.
member.param: The bounding box to fill or erase.
The palette index to fill with.
When true, erases voxels instead of filling.

member.name: T:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Operations.BrushOperation
member.summary: Paints or erases voxels within a shaped brush (sphere, cube, or cylinder) centered on a coordinate. Shape testing uses Euclidean distance for spheres, axis-aligned bounds for cubes, and XZ-plane Euclidean distance for cylinders.

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Operations.BrushOperation.Center
member.summary: The center coordinate of the brush stroke.

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Operations.BrushOperation.Brush
member.summary: The brush shape and radius.

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Operations.BrushOperation.PaletteIndex
member.summary: The palette index to paint with. Ignored when is true.

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Operations.BrushOperation.Erase
member.summary: When true, erases voxels instead of painting them.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Operations.BrushOperation.#ctor(BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Math.VoxelCoord,BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Core.BrushShape,System.Byte,System.Boolean,System.String)
member.summary: Creates a new brush operation.
member.param: The center coordinate of the brush stroke.
The palette index to paint with.
When true, erases voxels instead of painting.

member.name: T:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Operations.CompoundOperation
member.summary: Groups multiple sub-operations into a single atomic undo unit. Execute runs all sub-operations in order; undo reverses them in the opposite order.

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Operations.CompoundOperation.Operations
member.summary: The sub-operations in execution order.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Operations.CompoundOperation.#ctor(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Core.IVoxelOperation},System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Creates a new compound operation.
member.param: Human-readable description of the compound operation.

member.name: T:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Operations.CopyPasteOperation
member.summary: Pastes a at an offset position into the grid. Performs palette merging via when the clipboard's palette entries differ from the target grid's palette.

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Operations.CopyPasteOperation.Clipboard
member.summary: The clipboard data to paste.

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Operations.CopyPasteOperation.PasteOffset
member.summary: The world-space offset to paste the clipboard at.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Operations.CopyPasteOperation.#ctor(BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Core.VoxelClipboard,BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Math.VoxelCoord,System.String)
member.summary: Creates a new copy-paste operation.
member.param: The world-space offset to paste at.

member.name: T:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Operations.EraseOperation
member.summary: Removes a single voxel at a specific coordinate by setting it to . Captures the previous voxel state for undo.

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Operations.EraseOperation.Coord
member.summary: The coordinate to erase.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Operations.EraseOperation.#ctor(BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Math.VoxelCoord,System.String)
member.summary: Creates a new erase operation.

member.name: T:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Operations.FillOperation
member.summary: BFS flood fill operation. Starting from an origin coordinate, expands to all 6-connected neighbors that share the same palette index as the origin. Replaces them with the fill palette index. Bounded by an optional limit region.

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Operations.FillOperation.Origin
member.summary: The starting coordinate for the flood fill.

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Operations.FillOperation.FillPaletteIndex
member.summary: The palette index to fill with.

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Operations.FillOperation.Limit
member.summary: Bounding box that constrains the fill region.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Operations.FillOperation.#ctor(BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Math.VoxelCoord,System.Byte,BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Math.VoxelBounds,System.String)
member.summary: Creates a new flood fill operation.
member.param: The starting coordinate for the flood fill.
The palette index to fill with.
Bounding box that constrains the fill region.

member.name: T:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Operations.GridPatchOperation
member.summary: Applies a as a single undoable operation. Before-state is captured by serializing affected chunks before the delta is applied. Undo restores the chunks from the serialized snapshots and recalculates the voxel count.

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Operations.GridPatchOperation.Delta
member.summary: The binary delta data to apply.

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Operations.GridPatchOperation.BeforeChunks
member.summary: Serialized before-state of affected chunks. Null values represent chunks that did not exist before the delta was applied.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Operations.GridPatchOperation.#ctor(System.Byte[],System.String)
member.summary: Creates a new grid patch operation.
member.param: The binary delta data to apply.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Operations.GridPatchOperation.#ctor(System.Byte[],System.String,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Math.ChunkCoord,System.Byte[]})
member.summary: Creates a grid patch operation with pre-computed before-state snapshots. Used by on the sender side.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Operations.GridPatchOperation.GetAffectedChunkCoords
member.summary: Parses the delta header to extract all affected chunk coordinates (added, removed, and modified).

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Operations.GridPatchOperation.ComputeAffectedRegion
member.summary: Computes the affected region bounding box from the before-chunk coordinates.

member.name: T:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Operations.MirrorOperation
member.summary: Mirrors all non-empty voxels across a specified axis. The reflection uses the formula mirroredCoord = Min + Max - originalCoord for the mirrored axis, preserving the other two axes.

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Operations.MirrorOperation.MirrorAxis
member.summary: The axis to mirror across.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Operations.MirrorOperation.#ctor(BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Core.Axis,System.String)
member.summary: Creates a new mirror operation.

member.name: T:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Operations.PlaceOperation
member.summary: Places a single voxel at a specific coordinate with the given palette index. Captures the previous voxel state for undo.

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Operations.PlaceOperation.Coord
member.summary: The coordinate to place the voxel at.

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Operations.PlaceOperation.PaletteIndex
member.summary: The palette index to assign to the placed voxel.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Operations.PlaceOperation.#ctor(BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Math.VoxelCoord,System.Byte,System.String)
member.summary: Creates a new place operation.
member.param: The coordinate to place the voxel at.

member.name: T:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Operations.ReplaceOperation
member.summary: Replaces all voxels of one palette index with another across the entire grid. Preserves voxel flags during replacement.

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Operations.ReplaceOperation.FromIndex
member.summary: The palette index to search for and replace.

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Operations.ReplaceOperation.ToIndex
member.summary: The palette index to replace with.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Operations.ReplaceOperation.#ctor(System.Byte,System.Byte,System.String)
member.summary: Creates a new replace operation.
member.param: The palette index to search for.
The palette index to replace with.

member.name: T:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Operations.RotateOperation
member.summary: Rotates all non-empty voxels 90 degrees around a specified axis. Rotation formulas (relative to grid bounds max): Y-axis (maxZ-z, y, x), X-axis (x, maxZ-z, y), Z-axis (maxY-y, x, z). The affected region is the union of before and after bounds.

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Operations.RotateOperation.RotateAxis
member.summary: The axis to rotate around.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Operations.RotateOperation.#ctor(BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelBuilder.Core.Axis,System.String)
member.summary: Creates a new rotate operation.
